purpose: Transcript-only tone labels for the 100 newly admitted expansion200 YouTube Shorts rows.
scope: Labels only the new 100 rows from expansion200; prior 100 labels remain in hard30 v1 and remaining70 artifacts.

labeler.independence_posture: not independent; same-lane operational readout, not inter-rater reliability
labeler.transcript_body_storage: transcripts read transiently from data-lake caption packets; transcript bodies are not stored in repo artifacts
